name: atlassian
description: Jira and Confluence context via Atlassian MCP server (sooperset/mcp-atlassian)
notes: Minimal config — add auth details to .vscode/mcp.json after install. For Jira: JIRA_URL, JIRA_USERNAME, JIRA_API_TOKEN. For Confluence: CONFLUENCE_URL, CONFLUENCE_USERNAME, CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN. API tokens: https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. Requires uv/uvx: https://docs.astral.sh/uv/
